summary: Tested preview refresh/state sync fix after follow-up page refinements. All code changes verified and UI tests passed. Login flow works, dashboard loads correctly, Preview tab renders with Refresh button visible and functional.

preview_hash_improvement.details: Hash now includes updated_at and content.length (not just version) for detecting file changes: `${f.path}:${f.version || 0}:${f.updated_at || ''}:${typeof f.content === 'string' ? f.content.length : 0}`

stream_handler_directEditMode.details: directEditMode flag is passed in message_saved SSE event: `directEditMode: streamMeta.directEditMode || false`

dashboard_directEditMode_condition.details: onMessageSaved refreshes files when directEditMode is true (even if generatedFiles is empty): `if ((data.generatedFiles?.length > 0 || data.directEditMode) && !diffs?.length)`

preview_refresh_button.details: handleRefresh callback calls onRefreshFiles?.() to re-fetch files from server

right_panel_refresh_callback.details: handleRefreshFiles fetches latest files from /api/projects/{id}/files and passes callback to PreviewTab

features_tested.feature: Login flow works (email/password via Enter key)
Dashboard loads correctly with 'Your Projects' section
Project with files (BabelTest_8754 - 4 files) opens correctly
Preview tab renders with React (Babel) mode
Preview Refresh button visible with data-testid='preview-refresh'
Preview iframe renders content ('Welcome to the App')

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 code changes for preview refresh fix are correctly implemented
PreviewTab hash now includes updated_at and content.length for more robust change detection
directEditMode flag properly flows from stream-handler.js through SSE to Dashboard.jsx
Dashboard.jsx correctly triggers file refresh when directEditMode is true (even with empty generatedFiles)
Refresh button in PreviewTab now calls onRefreshFiles to re-fetch files from server
RightPanel properly passes handleRefreshFiles callback to PreviewTab

success_rate.backend: N/A (no backend API changes to test)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview refresh/state sync fix tested. Key findings: (1) PreviewTab hash now includes updated_at + content.length for better change detection. (2) directEditMode flag flows from stream-handler.js through SSE events to Dashboard.jsx. (3) Dashboard.jsx triggers file refresh when directEditMode is true (even if generatedFiles array is empty). (4) Refresh button in PreviewTab calls onRefreshFiles to re-fetch files from server. (5) RightPanel passes handleRefreshFiles callback to PreviewTab. (6) UI tests confirm: login works, dashboard loads, project with files opens, Preview tab renders with Refresh button visible, preview iframe shows content.
